steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student claims audiences ultimately preferred "resolution and closure" over the ongoing tension of the serial. The question asks which finding best supports that claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The 12th episode of *Clancy of the Mounted* was the most expensive episode of the series to produce.: measures budget, not audience preference. ✗
  • Choice B — The 12th episode of *Clancy of the Mounted* was viewed by more people than was any previous episode in the series.: shows audiences were most invested when resolution arrived — directly supports preferring closure. ✓
  • Choice C — Modern critics generally regard the first episode as the best installment of *Clancy of the Mounted*.: reflects later critics, not the original audience's preference. ✗
  • Choice D — Audiences at the time considered *Clancy of the Mounted* to belong to a genre other than the northern adventure genre.: categorizes the show but says nothing about what audiences preferred. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
